svg.aria-label: Flatland Tools: a tools suite for game and multimedia assets in VS Code. Sprite Atlas, Image Encoder, Normal Baker, Audio, Atlas Merge.
svg.title: Flatland Tools
svg.desc: Marketplace banner: the pixel-art FL mark with the flatland tools wordmark, and a gem signal rail naming each tool in the suite.
svg.text: A tools suite for game and multimedia assets that never leaves your editor.
